highlights.text: My general lean is we can re-test 5558.
My general lean is bulls can correct/consolidate on Monday and ideally bulls want to defend 5599.
Remember all short squeezes/relief rallies in a downtrend are caused by my core setup: The Failed Breakdown.
This got me long and I wrote on Thursday at 4pm: “ We have an active Failed Breakdown.

post_title: SPX Puts In 2 Green Days In A Row For 1st Time In A Month. Can It Keep Going? March 18 Plan
